overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with red hair walking through a futuristic urban environment with distinctive red elevated highway structures. The character progresses along a sidewalk past modern buildings with neon accents, approaching an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway pedestrian walkway with neon accents

agents.ego_description: player character with red hair walking steadily along the sidewalk under massive red elevated highway structures

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive red-orange steel highway structure spanning overhead with geometric supports
tall dark facade building with minimal windows on the left side
modern building with dark panels and horizontal red neon accent lighting
tall modern street lamp with horizontal light fixture
tropical palm trees visible in the distance along the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a futuristic urban walkway shaded by massive red elevated highway structures. The player character with red hair walks forward along a concrete sidewalk, following another pedestrian. Modern buildings with dark facades and red neon accents line the right side, while palm trees are visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance area under elevated highway

events.description: camera turns slightly right to follow the sidewalk curve along the building facade

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, passing by a building entrance with concrete stairs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in beige jacket walking ahead on the right side of the path

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs leading up to a dark building entrance with planters
dark colored sedan parked along the curb near the building entrance
large industrial ventilation units attached to the building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera follows the character as the path curves slightly right, bringing a building entrance with wide concrete stairs into view. A dark sedan is parked along the curb, and industrial ventilation equipment becomes visible on the building facade. The red highway structures continue overhead.

events.description: exiting the most covered section under the highway into a more open approach to the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking toward an intersection with increasing visibility of distant buildings and crosswalk signals

entered.detail: large concrete parking garage with multiple open levels visible ahead
pedestrian crossing signal pole with yellow cross symbol
low-rise commercial buildings with palm trees in front

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, the environment opens up approaching an intersection. A multi-story parking structure becomes visible ahead, while the red highway structures shift to the left side of the frame. A crosswalk signal pole appears on the left, and commercial buildings with palm trees become visible in the distance.

events.description: approaching crosswalk with red traffic light visible ahead, vehicles stopped at intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching the crosswalk at the intersection, preparing to cross the multi-lane street

notable_agents.action: dark vehicle stopped at the red traffic light at the intersection

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crosswalk lines on the asphalt approaching the camera
traffic signal showing red light suspended over the intersection

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a wide urban intersection with full sky visibility. The crosswalk markings become prominent on the sidewalk, and a traffic light hangs overhead showing red. The multi-story parking structure now appears on the right, while commercial buildings line the left. The character continues toward the crosswalk where vehicles wait at the light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a shaded futuristic urban corridor that gradually opens into a wide, sunlit city intersection. It begins on a concrete walkway beneath massive red elevated highway structures, following a red-haired character past dark buildings accented with red neon. As the path curves slightly right, the camera passes a parked dark sedan and a building entrance with wide concrete stairs and industrial ventilation equipment. The environment then expands as the character approaches an intersection, with the red highway structures shifting to the left to reveal a multi-story parking structure and distant palm trees. Finally, the scene opens fully to the sky at a wide crosswalk, where the character moves toward a red traffic light and waiting vehicles.
